evals.description: Triggers on interactive rebase request to clean up commits
evals.prompt: I have 6 messy WIP commits I want to squash into 2 clean commits before pushing my feature branch. How do I do that?
A bug appeared somewhere in the last 200 commits. I know it worked in the v3.0.0 tag. How do I find the exact commit that broke it?

evals.description: Can automate bisect with a test script
evals.prompt: How can I run git bisect automatically using my existing test suite instead of manually marking commits good or bad?

evals.description: Triggers on worktree request for parallel development
evals.prompt: I'm in the middle of a big feature and an urgent hotfix just came in. How can I work on both without losing my current state?

evals.description: Can set up pre-commit hooks with Husky and lint-staged
evals.prompt: How do I automatically run ESLint and Prettier on staged files before every commit, and share that config with my whole team?

evals.description: Can recover lost commits using reflog
evals.prompt: I ran git rebase and now some of my commits are gone. Is there any way to get them back?

evals.description: Correctly advises against force-pushing shared branches
evals.prompt: I rebased my main branch locally and now git push is failing with 'rejected'. Should I use git push --force?

evals.description: Can cherry-pick a commit range across branches
evals.prompt: I made 3 commits on my feature branch that fix a bug. I need those same 3 commits on the release branch without merging the entire feature.

evals.description: Explains DAG model and detached HEAD correctly
evals.prompt: After running git checkout on an old commit SHA, git says I'm in 'detached HEAD state'. What does that mean and what should I do?

evals.description: Correctly explains rebase vs merge tradeoffs
evals.prompt: Should I use git merge or git rebase to keep my feature branch up to date with main? What are the tradeoffs?

evals.description: Can resolve merge conflict using ours/theirs strategies
evals.prompt: I have a merge conflict in package-lock.json and I just want to keep the version from the branch I'm merging in. What's the fastest way?

evals.description: Does not trigger for basic git operations
evals.prompt: How do I clone a repository and make my first commit?
